<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band12-2_chunk002.pdf#page=12 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band12 p372 -->

<!-- header: NIEDERASCHAU -->

<!-- header: NIEDERASCHAI -->


[[File:Band12-2_chunk002_p012_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band12-2_chunk002_p012_img002.jpg|thumb|B<sub>6</sub> Maria Königin der Bekenner]]



[[File:Band12-2_chunk002_p012_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band12-2_chunk002_p012_img004.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band12-2_chunk002_p012_img005.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band12-2_chunk002_p012_img006.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band12-2_chunk002_p012_img007.jpg|thumb|B. Maria Königin der Engel]]



[[File:Band12-2_chunk002_p012_img008.jpg|thumb|B<sub>8</sub> Maria Königin aller Heilige]]



----
)/
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band12 p373 -->
